meta.summary: Legacy BRAKER3 braker.pl runtime for automated eukaryotic gene prediction with RNA-seq and protein evidence. Upstream marks BRAKER as deprecated and recommends BRAKER4 for new workflows.
meta.description: Legacy BRAKER3 braker.pl runtime for automated eukaryotic gene prediction with RNA-seq and protein evidence. Upstream marks BRAKER as deprecated and recommends BRAKER4 for new workflows.

test: (braker.pl --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Pipeline for predicting genes with GeneMark-EX and AUGUSTUS' >/dev/null && (braker.pl --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F -- '--genome=genome.fa' >/dev/null && (braker.pl --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F -- '--prot_seq=prot.fa' >/dev/null
prothint.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'prothint.py 2.6.0' >/dev/null && augustus --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'AUGUSTUS' >/dev/null && (tsebra.py --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'usage' >/dev/null

samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools' >/dev/null && bamtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bamtools' >/dev/null && diamond version 2>&1 | grep -F 'diamond version 2.0.15' >/dev/null && hisat2 --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'hisat2-align-s version 2.2.1' >/dev/null && stringtie --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx '2.2.1' >/dev/null && gffread --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx '0.12.7' >/dev/null

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-braker3-cdb-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>ctg1\nATGAAATAG\n' > "$tmp/tiny.fa"; cdbfasta "$tmp/tiny.fa" >/dev/null; cdbyank "$tmp/tiny.fa.cidx" -a ctg1 > "$tmp/out.fa"; grep -F '>ctg1' "$tmp/out.fa" >/dev/null; grep -F 'ATGAAATAG' "$tmp/out.fa" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: BRAKER
upstream.license: BRAKER scripts: Artistic License; GeneMark-ETP: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0; bundled third-party tools keep their own licenses; GeneMark commercial use requires a separate license
upstream.citation: Gabriel et al. 2024, BRAKER3; Bruna et al. 2024, GeneMark-ETP; Stanke et al. 2006/2008, AUGUSTUS
